mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT r.code FROM role r INNER JOIN user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND ur.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_role (user_id, role_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: UPDATE user_role SET deleted = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
